name: atomic-design-toolkit
description: Atomic Design toolkit for Flutter and Vite — decompose features into atoms, molecules, organisms, templates, and pages. Audit mode scans components, Vite bundle health (duplicates, hashless assets, mixed majors), and atomic-design enforcement hooks (V7: future-drift exposure via hook/CI/ownership cure presence) across 16+ design system lenses. Migrate mode consumes audit reports to drive phased remediation.

plugins.name: atomic-design-toolkit
plugins.description: Generate production-ready component hierarchies for Flutter and Vite (React / Vue / Svelte / Solid / vanilla) following Atomic Design methodology. Audit your codebase for decomposable components plus Vite bundle health (10 signals derived from real modernization: duplicate deps, legacy public/ assets, mixed majors, vendorized libs, hashless assets, outdated deps, CI audit coverage, HMR, visual regression, dual lockfiles) and atomic-design enforcement hooks (V7: 7 cure-presence checks measuring future-drift exposure — hooks, CI guards, ownership docs, agent rules). Emit structured reports; drive phased remediation with /migrate. Cross-reference against 16+ design systems (Material 3, Cupertino, Carbon, Bootstrap 5, Tailwind + shadcn, Primer, Polaris, Spectrum, etc.). 3 commands, 2 auto-activating skills.
